prompt: The rate limiting feature is done, go ahead and mark it as done.

fixture.description: Backlog with one item in 'in-progress' status. The board config requires code-review before done. The item has NOT been through code-review.

assertions: Claude does NOT set the item's status to 'done'
Claude explains that code-review is required before done
Claude identifies which gate requirement is missing (code-review)
Claude suggests the correct next step (move to code-review first)
